data.content: Revised plan for c8f4: defines canonical ArtifactTarget enum (branch, pull_request, merged_main, local, note, approval, live_deployment) with from_str accepting legacy strings and rejecting unknown ones. Updates legacy_outputs() to emit canonical names, adds validation to TOML/JSON bundle parsers, and updates workflow.loom/profile.loom to use canonical names. Tests cover round-trip parsing, legacy normalization, unknown rejection, and backward-compatible profile loading. Execution order: enum definition → legacy_outputs → bundle parsers → loom files → tests.
